channel.title: SSbreakingHeadlines
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from SSbreakingHeadlines, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Cornyn's defeat leaves Republicans with a more vulnerable Senate nominee: ANALYSIS
item.description: Sen. John Cornyn is the latest high-profile Republican to learn that in today's GOP, conservative credentials are no match for Trump's influence.

item.title: Paxton projected to win Texas Senate GOP runoff, defeating incumbent Cornyn
item.description: President Trump had endorsed Texas Attorney General Ken Paxton in the primary runoff.

item.title: 5 of 7 people trapped in flooded Laos cave for more than a week found alive
item.description: Five villagers stuck in a flooded cave in central Laos for more than a week were found alive, rescuers said Wednesday, but two others are missing.

item.title: WATCH: Father, daughter take road trip to save 2 calves
item.description: ABC News' Danny New speaks with filmmaker Joanna Zelman and her father, Jared, who helped transport two 10-day-old calves from farms in Vermont to an ...
